title: ISic001837. Fragment of an honorific inscription mentioning Pompeia Sosia Falconilla
body:
Text encoding: Jonathan Prag; edition source: autopsy Prado 2023-05-09
1[So]siạ[e Falconillae]
2Q(uinti) Pomp[ei Sosi Prisci co(n)s(ulis) fil(iae)]
3Q(uinti) Pompe[i Falconis co(n)s(ulis) nep(ti)]
4Q(uinti) Ṣ[osi Senecionis co(n)s(ulis) II pro(nepti)]
5[Sex(ti) Iuli Frontini co(n)s(ulis) III abn(epti)]
[---]

Text encoding: Jonathan Prag; edition source: autopsy Prado 2023-05-09
1[..]SI.[............]
2QPOMP[....................]
3QPOMPE[.................]
4Q.[.......................]
5[...........................]
[---]

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text of Prado from autopsy, after Eck and Barbera

English translation

Jonathan Prag

For Pompeia Sosia Falconilla, daughter of the consul Q. Pompeius Sosius Priscus, granddaughter of the consul Q. Pompeius Falco, great-granddaughter of the consul Q. Sosius Senecio, great-great-granddaughter of the consul Sextus Iulius Frontinus...

Italian translation

Francesca Prado

Per Pompeia Sosia Falconilla, figlia di Q. Pompeius Sosius Priscus console, nipote di Q. Pompeius Falco, console, pronipote di Q. Sosius Senecio console, pronipote di Sextus Iulius Frontinus console…

commentary

bibliography

  • Orsi 1900 49 no.17 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001707

Large monumental v-cut letters with neat serifs.

Lines 2-3 55-65 Interlineation line 1 to 4 20-30
Licensed under a Creative Commons-Attribution 4.0 licence.
